description: Crab Champions is a rogue-like crab game.

0.1.0.description:
# Initial Release!

Crab Champions in Archipelago!!!
Up to 15,096 locations, tons of items, lots of options, fully customizable!

Follow the installation instructions in the README.

Open issues here or reach out in the Crab Champions thread in the Archipelago Discord if you run into any problems.  This is ultimately a fairly simple mod, so feel free to make feature requests or pull requests.

0.1.1.description:
Small Bug Fix:
Updated README instructions to include editing the UE4SS-settings.ini
Fixed old path name in APClient
Moved item spawning to lobby only to temporarily fix crashing mid-run.  All items you have received will be granted in the lobby.  You can still pick up items you have received mid run after they have been sent to you.

0.2.0.description:
Goal finally works!

ap-client.dll is included in this release, so no need to download it separately.  Removed from README.

0.2.1.description: Updated mod and APworld, fixing locations not sending UT not working properly.

1.0.0.description:
# Crab Champions Archipelago v1.0.0

The first full release of the Crab Champions Archipelago randomizer!

## What's New

This is the initial stable release, featuring:

### Core Features
- **Equipment Randomization** — Weapons, melee weapons, and abilities are locked behind the multiworld item pool
- **Location Checks** — Island completions, equipment runs, rank runs, and perk/mod/relic pickups all send checks
- **Ranked Difficulty Tiers** — Full support for all 8 ranks (Bronze through Prismatic) with configurable check ranges
- **Cascade Mode** — Completing islands at higher ranks can auto-complete lower rank checks
- **Death Link** — Synchronized deaths across all connected players
- **In-Game Overlay** — Connection panel (F4) with server/slot/password fields, item feed, and equipment progress tracking
- **Auto-Save Connection** — Server details are saved after successful connection for next launch

### Inventory System
- **C++ Inventory Mod** — Items are added directly to your inventory instantly and crash-free via the `CrabInvMngmt` companion mod
- **Perk/Mod Stacking** — Duplicate items properly stack instead of taking extra slots
- **Inventory Overflow Queue** — Items received when inventory is full are automatically applied when a slot opens up (per inventory type)
- **Mid-Run Item Granting** — Items can be received during runs, not just in the lobby

### Configuration Options
- **Victory Conditions** — Configurable required rank, run length, and number of weapons/melee/abilities needed
- **Equipment Pool** — Control how many of each equipment type are randomized
- **Equipment Check Mode** — Choose whether non-pool equipment generates location checks
- **Greed Item Mode** — Auto-add, drop on floor, or skip greed items entirely
- **Crystal Cache Percentage** — Balance between crystal rewards and extra perk/mod stacks
- **Rank Modifiers** — Extra ranked checks, cascade, and non-progression above required rank

## Installation

### Archipelago World
1. Download `crabchampions.apworld` and place it in your Archipelago `custom_worlds/` directory
2. Generate template options and configure your YAML

### Game Mod
1. Install [UE4SS v3.0.1](https://github.com/UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS/releases/tag/v3.0.1) into `CrabChampions\Binaries\Win64`
2. Set `ConsoleEnabled = 1` in `UE4SS-settings.ini`
3. Download and extract `CrabChampionsAP.zip` — copy `CrabChampionsAP/`, `CrabInvMngmt/`, and `mods.txt` into the `Mods/` directory
4. Launch the game, press **F4** to open the connection panel, and **F3** to connect

See the [full README](README.md) for detailed configuration documentation.

## Requirements
- [Crab Champions](https://store.steampowered.com/app/774801/Crab_Champions/)
- [UE4SS v3.0.1](https://github.com/UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS/releases/tag/v3.0.1)
- [Archipelago](https://archipelago.gg/) v0.6.4+

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crabchampions.apworld` | Archipelago world file — place in `custom_worlds/` |
| `CrabChampionsAP.zip` | Game mod — extract into `Mods/` directory |

1.0.1.description:
# Crab Champions Archipelago v1.0.1

Stability fix for players with large item pools.

## Changes

### Performance & Stability
- **Rate-limited item granting** — Items are now processed in small batches with delays between chunks, preventing engine overload when receiving many items at once
- **Duplicate item merging** — Multiple copies of the same perk/mod are combined into a single inventory call (e.g. 15x Driller adds 15 levels in one operation instead of 15 separate calls)
- **Smart overflow handling** — Inventory types that are full are detected immediately, skipping unnecessary processing for remaining items of that type
- **Batched crystal grants** — Multiple crystal rewards received in quick succession are combined into a single grant

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed overflow queue losing items when merged entries couldn't be applied
- Fixed crashes for players with ~600+ items in their pool

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crabchampions.apworld` | Archipelago world file — place in `custom_worlds/` |
| `CrabChampionsAP.zip` | Game mod — extract into `Mods/` directory |

1.1.0.description:
# Crab Champions Archipelago v1.1.0

New features, better logic, and major stability improvements.

## New Features

### Progressive Inventory Slots
A new optional setting that locks your perk, weapon mod, ability mod, and melee mod slots at the start. Slot unlocks are sent as AP items, adding a new layer of progression. Crystal slot purchases are blocked while this is active.

**New options:**
- `progressive_slots` — enable/disable (off by default)
- `starting_perk_slots` — how many perk slots you start with (default 6 of 24)
- `starting_weapon_mod_slots` — (default 6 of 24)
- `starting_ability_mod_slots` — (default 4 of 12)
- `starting_melee_mod_slots` — (default 4 of 12)

### Pickup Tag Logic
Items that require specific prerequisites are now properly gated in logic. For example, Time Ring won't be in logic until you've received Time Bolt, Time Claws, Time Explosion, or Time Shot. This covers 30 items across 13 tag categories including elemental, critical, turret, speed, and more.

### Greed Item Mode
New option to control how Greed items (items that can't be dropped once picked up) are handled:
- **Auto** — added directly to your inventory
- **Drop** — spawned on the floor for manual pickup
- **Skip** — removed from the item/location pool entirely

### Improved Item Feed
The in-game item feed now shows natural language messages:
- "You found your Driller (Complete Island 1)"
- "Alex sent you Katana (Perk: Vitality)"
- Color-coded by item classification (progression, useful, filler, trap)

## Stability Improvements
- Items are now processed in small batches with delays, preventing crashes for players with large item pools (~600+ items)
- Duplicate items are merged before granting — 15 copies of the same perk are applied in one operation
- Crystal rewards are batched into single grants
- Overflow items are tracked per inventory type — full perks no longer block weapon mod grants
- Broken inventory entries (from race conditions) are automatically cleaned up

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed rank detection being off by one (ECrabRank is 1-indexed)
- Fixed victory rule not counting non-pool equipment when equipment check mode is regular
- Fixed completion counts being incorrectly clamped when equipment check mode allows non-pool equipment
- Fixed overflow queue losing items when merged entries couldn't be applied
- Fixed enum resolution errors spamming the log

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crabchampions.apworld` | Archipelago world file — place in `custom_worlds/` |
| `CrabChampionsAP.zip` | Game mod — extract into `Mods/` directory |

1.1.1.description:
# Crab Champions Archipelago v1.1.1

Bug fixes and a new option for controlling pickup checks.

## New Option

### Pickup Checks
New toggle (on by default) that controls whether picking up perks, relics, and mods generates location checks. When disabled:
- Perks, relics, and mods are no longer location checks (up to 305 fewer locations)
- Inventory sanitization is disabled — items you pick up in-game are kept normally
- Weapons, abilities, and melee are still locked behind AP as usual
- Island completions, equipment runs, and rank runs still generate checks

This is useful for players who want a simpler randomizer focused on equipment and island progression without tracking every pickup.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed inventory sanitization running even when it should be disabled, causing items to be incorrectly stripped or merged
- Fixed bundled weapon mods (e.g., Fire Shot from Flamethrower) persisting when a disallowed weapon is reverted by equipment lock
- Fixed false location checks being sent for bundled mods from disallowed weapons

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crabchampions.apworld` | Archipelago world file — place in `custom_worlds/` |
| `CrabChampionsAP.zip` | Game mod — extract into `Mods/` directory |

1.1.2.description:
# Crab Champions Archipelago v1.1.2

Bug fixes for lobby return issues with progressive slots and item grants.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed progressive inventory slot locks (perks, weapon mods, ability mods, melee mods) not reapplying when returning to the lobby after a run — slots now correctly stay locked until unlocked via AP items
- Fixed items being granted twice on lobby return when they had previously failed to grant mid-run due to full inventory

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crabchampions.apworld` | Archipelago world file — place in `custom_worlds/` |
| `CrabChampionsAP.zip` | Game mod — extract into `Mods/` directory |

1.2.0.description:
Add equipment locking, save backup safety, and pickup description updates

- Pool equipment now locked in lobby UI — weapons/abilities/melee show as locked until received via AP
- Save game backup before modifying unlock state — auto-restores on crash to prevent save corruption
- Equipment properly restores on disconnect, including EquipLock deactivation
- Pickup descriptions show AP item info: whose item is at each location and what it is
- [CHECKED] tag updates live when locations are checked during a run
- [RECEIVED] tag shows when you've been sent the in-game item, so you know it won't be stripped on pickup
- Fix item duplication on reconnect by resetting inventory before re-applying items

1.3.0.description:
## Highlights

Three new options for tailoring how much of the game AP tracks, a cleanup of the rank options, and a major generation speedup.

**Not Compatible with previous mod or APworld versions.**

## New Options

### `minimize_run_checks` (Toggle, default off)
Drops redundant run-completion checks. When equipment runs exist, the per-rank island check (`Complete Island X on Rank`) and the per-weapon island check (`Complete Island X with Weapon`) are removed in favor of the more specific `Complete Island X with Weapon on Rank` check, which already covers them. Cuts location count by 30–50% in typical configs with no gameplay impact.

### `limit_pickup_pool` (Toggle, default off)
Limits the AP item pool to a randomly-selected subset matching per-run inventory caps: 24 perks, 24 weapon mods, 12 ability mods, 12 melee mods, 10 relics. Items outside the subset stay in-game as natural pickups.

### `limit_pickup_locations` (Toggle, default off)
Limits pickup location checks to the chosen subset (same one used by `limit_pickup_pool` when both are on). Items outside the subset still appear in-game but produce no location check when picked up. Can be enabled independently of `limit_pickup_pool`.

## Option Cleanup

### Breaking YAML change
`extra_ranked_island_checks` + `non_progression_above_required` are replaced by a single `extra_rank_checks` Choice. Update your YAMLs:

| Old | New |
|---|---|
| `extra_ranked_island_checks: false` | `extra_rank_checks: none` |
| `extra_ranked_island_checks: true` + `non_progression_above_required: false` | `extra_rank_checks: progression` |
| `extra_ranked_island_checks: true` + `non_progression_above_required: true` | `extra_rank_checks: filler_only` |

### Documentation
Every option's docstring was rewritten for clarity, with cross-references between related options and concrete examples. README updated to match.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed `FillError` on configs with extra rank checks plus non-progression
- Fixed server crash on connect when using `greed_item_mode: skip` (client was checking locations that don't exist server-side)
- Fixed natural in-game pickups (greed items, items outside the pickup subset) getting stripped from inventory
- Fixed `minimize_run_checks` having no effect when `equipment_check_mode: disabled`

## Performance & Stability

- Generation timeout rate dropped from ~33–50% to 0/1000 over a 1000-run fuzz. Extreme configs that previously hung now finish in under a second.
- The DeathLink tag is now only sent to slots that opted in, instead of always being on.
- The equipment overlay shows `[✓]` for weapons/melee/abilities you've completed at the required rank, alongside the existing `[+]` received / `[-]` not received markers.

## Download
**Not Compatible with previously generated worlds**

- Archipelago world: `crabchampions.apworld` → place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds/` directory
- In-game mod: `CrabChampionsAP` folder → extract into your Crab Champions `Mods/` directory (UE4SS required)

1.3.1.description:
## Minor Update

No changes to mod, only change is in the options descriptions.

### Bug Fix:
Remove special character in Options.py causing some users to be unable to generate after opening their yamls in some word processors.
